---
title: "REAL"
generated: true
description: "The ordinary real algebra :math:`( mathbb{R}, +,  times)`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.semiring.algebras`](../nitrix-semiring-algebras.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:REAL -->
```python
REAL: StrictSemiring[Any] = StrictSemiring(monoid=(_SumMonoid()), binary_op=(_ProductSemigroup()), identity=0.0, annihilator=0.0, name='real', matmul_vjp=real_matmul_vjp, ell_matmul_vjp=real_ell_matmul_vjp)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:REAL -->
The ordinary real algebra $(\mathbb{R}, +, \times)$.

Sum-of-products contraction: the monoid is addition with identity 0 and
the binary operation is multiplication, with 0 as annihilator so a zero
entry masks its product. Recovers standard matrix multiplication.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
